description_long: This jet ski features a futuristic, angular design with a predominantly light gray body accented by deep red metallic elements on the lower legs and side panels. The cockpit is open and elevated, with a single seat that has a contoured backrest and visible control panels in front of the operator. The front of the vehicle is squared off, with integrated headlights and side mirrors, while the rear showcases a pair of wide, treaded footrests. The jet ski stands on two robust, mechanical legs, suggesting an amphibious or all-terrain capability. The control area is equipped with various buttons, levers, and a joystick, and an antenna extends from the rear of the cockpit. The overall construction appears to be a mix of metal and composite materials, giving it a sturdy yet sleek appearance.
description: A futuristic, angular jet ski with a light gray body, red metallic accents, and an open cockpit featuring a single contoured seat and advanced control panels.
description_view_0: Front view shows the squared-off nose, integrated headlights, and the wide stance of the mechanical legs.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the open cockpit, contoured seat, and the red metallic lower leg structure.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the control panels, treaded footrests, and the symmetrical design of the legs.
description_view_3: Right side view displays the cockpit's interior, control panels, and the angular bodywork with red accents.
attribute_handlebar_design: The handlebar is a straight, horizontal bar with dark grips on each end, integrated with control buttons and a central joystick, all in a dark color scheme.
attribute_seat_configuration: Single contoured seat with a high backrest, upholstered in dark material, designed for one rider with visible side bolsters for support.
